The timing of Gasc=C3=B3n=E2=80=99s decision, coming just days before an el=

 down in the polls, and he=E2=80=99s doing this now because he wants to dis=
tract voters from a record of public safety failure with a made-for-TV medi=
a event,=E2=80=9D Hochman told me in a phone interview. Nevertheless, the D=
=2EA. race has cast a light on Hollyw=
ood=E2=80=99s quiet shift away from the

=94ending cash bail, ordering prosecutors not to seek enhanced sentences fo=
r prior convictions or gang affiliations, etcetera.

Hochman remained noncommittal about whether he would have advocated for the=
